name: Abort Button UI
summary: Frontend abort button in the agent context header for stopping execution
goals: Provide a prominent abort button during agent execution
Show clear visual feedback when abort is in progress

specDetail.description: An abort button in the AgentContextHeader component that appears during active agent execution. Shows a stop icon and 'Abort' label. Displays a loading state while the abort request is being processed.

parameters.name: isExecuting
parameters.description: Whether the agent is currently executing (button only visible when true)

parameters.name: onAbort
parameters.description: Callback invoked when abort is clicked

parameters.name: isAborting
parameters.description: Whether the abort request is in progress

constraints: Must only be visible during active agent execution
Must show a confirmation tooltip on hover to prevent accidental clicks
Must disable the button after abort is triggered to prevent double-abort

acceptanceCriteria.given: the agent is actively executing a request
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user clicks the abort button
acceptanceCriteria.then: the agent execution is stopped and a confirmation is shown

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
